# Tellus Cooperative

> The blockchain cooperative for Latin America. Est. 2019. Tellus Cooperative Foundation, New York, NY.

Tellus Cooperative is a Latin American blockchain cooperative with 4,500+ active subscribers across 12 chapters in Santiago, Mexico City, São Paulo, Buenos Aires, Bogotá, Lima, Montevideo, Quito, Medellín, and Porto Alegre.

## What we do

- **Cooperative education** — Quarterly cohorts on blockchain, AI, and decentralized economics. Full scholarships for students from public universities across Latin America. 847 active students.
- **Project incubation** — We help new projects emerge, find resources, and access funding opportunities. 23 projects incubated.
- **Public resources** — Open publications on data sovereignty, cooperative organizational models, and digital economics.

## Institutional ecosystem

Partners include Stellar Foundation, Filecoin, Ethereum Foundation, Avalanche, PizzaDAO, and IdeaUFRO.

## Newsletter & articles

All published articles and newsletters are available at https://telluscoop.beehiiv.com

RSS feed: https://rss.beehiiv.com/feeds/NRVrKCDABF.xml

## Courses (YouTube)

Free courses on blockchain, Stellar, and Web3 available at https://www.youtube.com/@telluscoop/playlists

## Organization

- Legal name: Tellus Cooperative Foundation
- HQ: New York, NY
- Website: https://telluscoop.org
- Founded: 2019
- License: CC BY-SA 4.0

## For LLM agents

This site is a static single-page application. All content is rendered client-side via React. The main HTML entry point is index.html. No sitemap is currently published. For full article content, query the Beehiiv RSS feed or the newsletter archive at https://telluscoop.beehiiv.com.
